competitors.title: Aider + Ollama: Complete Setup Guide for Local AI Pair Programming
key_points: Step-by-step setup: Install Ollama (macOS/Windows), pull model (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct-q4_K_M recommended)
Aider install via pip: pip install aider-chat
API endpoint config: OLLAMA_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:11434
Launch command: aider --model ollama_chat/deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct-q4_K_M --no-show-model-warnings --yes
Useful Aider commands: /add, /drop, /run, /undo, /diff, /clear, /help
Performance env vars: OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=1, OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1
Python v3.13 compatibility issues noted — recommend v3.12

competitors.title: OpenCode CLI: Another Local AI Coding Option with 75+ LLM Providers
key_points: OpenCode CLI as an alternative to Aider with broader LLM provider support (75+ providers)
Supports local models via Ollama integration
Comparison with Claude Code: cost analysis showing local models eliminate per-token costs
Installation and model configuration walkthrough
Local model comparison tables: performance vs cost tradeoffs across different hardware configs

angles: Zero cost, zero cloud: How Aider + Ollama eliminates API fees and data privacy concerns entirely

Offline-first development: Set up AI pair programming that works without internet — ideal for secure/air-gapped environments

Aider as the bridge: How Aider's Git-aware architecture makes it superior to generic AI chat for code editing — even with local models
Performance tuning: Ollama environment variables and hardware tips to get acceptable speed from local inference on consumer hardware
